basic_details.job_title: NII Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Immunology (NII) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Immunology has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (Project) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Delhi. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc in any branch of Life Sciences with NET or equivalent degree as per DST guidelines
qualification.details: M.Sc in any branch of Life Sciences with NET or equivalent degree as per DST guidelines. At least two years of laboratory research experience, particularly in Molecular Biology, Biochemistry and Biophysics. Experience in cloning, overexpression, purification, site-directed mutagenesis, and cell culture assays.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NII to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NII Junior Research Fellow (Project) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NII Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NII Junior Research Fellow (Project) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NII Junior Research Fellow (Project) Vacancy Details 2026
NII Junior Research Fellow (Project) Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: M.Sc in any branch of Life Sciences with NET or equivalent degree as per DST guidelines. At least two years of laboratory research experience, particularly in Molecular Biology, Biochemistry and Biophysics. Experience in cloning, overexpression, purification, site-directed mutagenesis, and cell culture assays.

content_sections.heading: NII Junior Research Fellow (Project) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NII Junior Research Fellow (Project) Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NII to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NII Junior Research Fellow (Project) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NII Junior Research Fellow (Project) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NII Junior Research Fellow (Project) position is 20-07-2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow (Project) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/- plus 27% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for this position?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold an M.Sc degree in any branch of Life Sciences and possess a NET or equivalent qualification as per DST guidelines. Relevant research experience is also required.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the NII recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (Project) role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves online application, followed by shortlisting of candidates, and finally an online interview.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the National Institute of Immunology located?
faq.answer: The National Institute of Immunology is located in New Delhi, Delhi.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this NII recruitment?
faq.answer: The position of Junior Research Fellow (Project) is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow (Project) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (Project) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What kind of research experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: At least two years of laboratory research experience is preferred, particularly in Molecular Biology, Biochemistry, and Biophysics, including experience in cloning, overexpression, purification, and cell culture assays.

faq.question: Q10. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Research Fellow (Project) position is scheduled for 21-07-2026.
